crime.value: Assassination by poisoning - deadly venom added to drink at party
crime.quote: pored the 20 ml of a very deadly venom on the chill

victim.value: Gadafi, described as a tyrant who ruled for over 40 years
victim.quote: For everyone who tolerated the tyrant Gadafi for more than 40 years

closed_world.value: Gadafi's heavily guarded mansion during a private party

culprit_and_motive.value: Paco, hired assassin paid to kill the tyrant for the people
culprit_and_motive.quote: Well Paco, will you do it? All right hand in the money, first kill Gadafi

red_herring.value: Heart attack diagnosis masks poisoning - medics provide false cause of death
red_herring.quote: All the medics told us that he had died because of a heart attack, but the only one who knew the truth was Paco.

clue_fairness.value: Reader witnesses poison preparation and administration alongside perpetrator
clue_fairness.quote: pored the 20 ml of a very deadly venom on the chill. He went walking to where Gadafi was talking to his friends

social_world.value: Tyrannical regime with security apparatus protecting dictator from oppressed populace
social_world.quote: For everyone who tolerated the tyrant Gadafi for more than 40 years.

alibi.value: Butler disguise creates false identity and legitimate presence at party
alibi.quote: Hello, I'm a butler from the party I am so late because one of the top class guests Mr. Tahoka asked me

reveal_mechanic.value: Photographic evidence of death confirms mission completion
reveal_mechanic.quote: He rapidly took a picture from a long distance of the dead body

media_and_audience.value: Public celebration and national liberation narrative following tyrant's death
media_and_audience.quote: All Libya exploded with emotion because the tyrant Gadafi was now dead.

_meta.title: ebook matteo castro the great revange
